prompt: Create a flashy Japanese YouTube thumbnail in a luxurious black-and-gold money-making style, packed with dramatic visual impact and designed to feel viral, celebratory, and high-value. Use a dark black background filled with intense golden light bursts, glitter particles, sparkles, lens flares, and streaking fireworks radiating outward from the center. Scatter shiny gold confetti across the whole frame. Place piles and angled stacks of Japanese yen banknotes in the lower left and lower right background, partially visible and glowing under the gold lighting. In the center, feature huge embossed metallic gold Japanese typography with thick beveled 3D edges, strong highlights, black shadowing, and a premium foil texture. The top headline should read "フォロワー100人未満でも" in bold white Japanese text with a dark outline, centered near the top. The main central text should read "画像生成で" on the upper middle line and "月100万" on the largest line below, both in giant gold 3D serif-style Japanese characters, with "100" especially dominant and oversized. Beneath that, add a wide black banner with gold trim and elegant ornamental corners, containing the subtitle text "0からの実績を完全公開・再現可能メソッド" in white Japanese characters, with "完全公開" highlighted in gold. Along the bottom, place exactly 3 horizontally aligned black-and-gold rounded rectangular callout panels with ornate gold borders and subtle glow. The left panel contains a gold upward-trending chart icon and the text "実績スクショ公開". The center panel contains a gold map pin icon and the text "0→100ロードマップ". The right panel contains a gold rocket icon and the text "今すぐ始める方法". Add small laurel or decorative gold flourishes around these bottom panels. On the right side of the composition, place a cute chibi sheep mascot with fluffy light blue wool, cream-colored horns and ears, a simple neutral face, and a small body, holding an open red book labeled "BOOK". The mascot should overlap the right side of the main text area slightly and be outlined clearly so it stands out from the glittering background. Overall composition should be extremely high contrast, richly saturated gold, glossy, crowded, and optimized as a bold social media thumbnail that instantly communicates wealth, success, and AI image-generation income.
